steps.title: Identify the goal and the relevant note
steps.content: The student wants to explain whom the award is named for. From the notes, exactly one piece of information answers this: “It is named after groundbreaking British mathematician Alan Turing.”

steps.title: Select the choice addressing the goal
steps.content: C names Alan Turing as the award's namesake. The other three discuss either who won the award or the award's criteria, neither of which addresses the student's goal. That matches choice C — C is correct.
